name: @arves/cloud-preview
description: ARVES Cloud Platform (P8) PREVIEW — a local multi-tenant HTTP gateway in front of the real reference Kernel: one-world ContentIds over HTTP, per-tenant idempotency via process isolation, hard input hygiene. NOT a deployed SaaS; no auth, no TLS, no durability across restart.

platform.consumes: ARVES Runtime v1.0 (SDK KernelBridge -> arves-bridge -> real Kernel) — FROZEN
proves: hosted access to the real Kernel
rcrCandidates: bridge: shard selection per request (SHARD-001 native tenancy)
